ShortDescription.Value: AdvancedTPM - Advanced Tax and Production Manager

Publish.LongDescription:
Take Absolute Control of Your City's Economy
Advanced Tax and Production Manager (AdvancedTPM) is an all-in-one economic dashboard covering taxes, production, companies, residential zones, districts, and services.
## Residential Browser
Filter and sort every residential building in your city by density, level, district, theme, asset pack, occupancy, happiness, and more.
The browser is built to support all content without needing a mod update. Base Game buildings, DLC region packs, themed content, and custom creator packs all appear automatically. If a content pack provides a filter icon the mod uses it, exactly as it appears in the game menus. New packs added in future game updates will show up without any update to this mod.
- Theme and region filters with each theme showing the content pack own icon. - Per-pack placement counts in the summary table showing how many buildings from each installed content pack are on your map, split by density tier. - 50 buildings per page for fast rendering even in very large cities. - Live updates pause automatically when a building row is expanded so the detail view stays stable. - Two camera actions per row: jump to the building on the map, or select and focus it in the game info panel.
## Tax and Production Dashboard
- Per-resource tax sliders for 50+ resources across raw materials, industrial goods, immaterial services, commercial retail, and entertainment. - Real-time production and consumption bars with surplus and deficit indicators. - Resources grouped by supply chain category. - Per-resource and total tax income with in-game currency formatting. - Workforce stats and demand signals per resource.
## Company Browser
- Sortable and filterable table by zone, profitability tier, profit range, or text search. - Expand any row for brand name, address, level, zone, output and input resources, staffing bars, and full efficiency breakdown with CS2 icons. - Company happiness score in rows and detail panels. - Signature building detection. All known DLC signature buildings are flagged and used by the Advisor. - Click to jump the camera to any company building.
## Districts Dashboard
- Reorderable district cards with demographic metrics and district-level policies. - Happiness aggregation per district.
## Services Browser
- Filterable panel for city service buildings with live metrics.
## Auto-Tax Engine
- 6-factor scoring balancing profitability, happiness, production, demand, company count, and tax income. - Per-resource min and max ranges. Lock specific resources from auto-adjustment. - Profitability weight slider for finer control over the scoring formula.
## Adaptive Learning Advisor
- Learns sensitivity, income response, production impact, and volatility per resource over time. - Confidence-weighted recommendations with full decision log. - Persistent profiles saved to disk and loaded between sessions.
## Performance
Built for the Cohtml engine using direct-DOM manipulation. UI thread cost is approximately 1.3ms with no measurable impact on game FPS.
Publish.ChangeLog:
## v1.1.4 - Signature Buildings, UI Fixes, and Stability
### Added - Signature tab icon rendering is now fixed. Full DLC building whitelist is complete. - ThemeIcon support added to Residential filter dropdowns. - New CustomSelect component replaces native dropdowns panel-wide to fix viewport clipping. - Profitability weight slider added to the Auto-Tax settings panel.
### Fixed - Removed blank icon stubs for user-created mods. - Fixed UI clipping in panel dropdowns. - Resolved C# compilation errors in school, hospital, and garbage data extraction. - Eliminated spammy heartbeat logs that were causing soft-crashes. - Fixed Residential summary table header showing plain text instead of pack icons. - Fixed window dragging occasionally getting stuck after release. - Improved Auto-Tax locale strings and enabled-count label spacing.
## v1.1.3 - Residential Browser and Custom Asset Tracking
### Added - Residential Browser: Filterable and sortable panel for all residential zones. - Custom asset pack detection and grouping with PackIcon headers. - District-level demographics and household stats.
### Fixed - Base Game icon now shows the correct Paradox Star icon for vanilla assets. - Theme names for custom assets are preserved as authored. - Zero-allocation buffer optimization for building data parsing.
